text: Open Source Intel Irans VP: “The security of the Strait of Hormuz is not free. One cannot restrict Iran's oil exports while expecting free security for others. The choice is clear: either a free oil market for all, or the risk of significant costs for everyone. Stability in global fuel prices depends on a guaranteed and lasting end to the economic and military pressure against Iran and its allies.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗副总统：“霍尔木兹海峡的安全并非免费。人们不能在限制伊朗石油出口的同时，又指望他人的安全是免费的。选择很明确：要么所有人都能享受自由的石油市场，要么每个人都要承担巨大成本的风险。全球燃料价格的稳定取决于对伊朗及其盟友的经济和军事压力得到保证且持久的终结。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Around 100 cars took over a Queens intersection early Saturday, lighting fires and doing burnouts near a gas station as a drivers waves a Palestinian flag. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045999116568682946/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 周六凌晨，约100辆汽车占领了皇后区的一个十字路口，在加油站附近点火并进行烧胎表演，其中一名司机挥舞着巴勒斯坦国旗。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045999116568682946/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor When you have to kick the President of the United States out of the room in order to carry out a dangerous rescue, it’s time to kick him out of office too. When President Donald Trump learned that two American pilots had gone missing in Iran on Good Friday, he “screamed at aides for hours” and was then “kept out of the room” while his team was given minute-by-minute updates, according to the WSJ https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/trump-screamed-aides-missing-pilots-iran-b2960603.html https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2045993391180161387/photo/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: 战争监测 当你为了执行一次危险的救援行动而不得不将美国总统赶出房间时，也是时候将他赶出办公室了。据《华尔街日报》报道，当唐纳德·特朗普总统得知两名美国飞行员在耶稣受难日在伊朗失踪时，他“对助手大喊大叫了几个小时”，随后在团队获得实时更新时被“拒之门外”。 https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/trump-screamed-aides-missing-pilots-iran-b2960603.html https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2045993391180161387/photo/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人 推文

text: Open Source Intel Just so we are on the same page, the crew for the Iranian cargo ship TOUSKA are in the hands of the USMC (U.S. Marines) https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045997456727343476/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 为了确保我们达成共识，伊朗货船“TOUSKA”号的船员目前掌握在美国海军陆战队（USMC）手中。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045997456727343476/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran parliament speaker Ghalibaf: “Vibe-trading digital oil is like vibe-hedging in treasuries during Hormuz risk-off. Both share one house of cards that works on paper. Difference: oil at least has Dated Brent. Treasuries? Vibes all the way down. EUCRBRDT Index GP <go” He’s obviously not writing this, we may know who it is. Zamanabadi is a suspect tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：“交易数字石油就像在霍尔木兹海峡避险情绪高涨时对国债进行对冲。两者都共享一个在纸面上行得通的纸牌屋。区别在于：石油至少有布伦特原油现货价格。国债呢？完全是靠感觉。EUCRBRDT Index GP <go” 他显然不是自己写的，我们可能知道是谁写的。扎马纳巴迪（Zamanabadi）是嫌疑人。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇰🇵🇰🇷 North Korea has fired a ballistic missile of undetermined type in an easterly direction, Yonhap reports. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇰🇵 Kim Jong Un observed the test launch of tactical ballistic missiles on April 19, according to KCNA. Five Hwasongpho-11Ra surface-to-surface missiles struck a concentrated target area of 12.5–13 hectares at operational range. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“据韩联社报道，🇰🇵🇰🇷朝鲜向东部方向发射了一枚不明型号的弹道导弹。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 据朝中社报道，金正恩于4月19日观摩了战术弹道导弹试射。五枚“火星炮-11Ra”地对地导弹击中了作战范围内12.5至13公顷的集中目标区域。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 Trump: Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE…" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters warns it will respond to U.S. violation: The aggressor United States, by violating the ceasefire and committing an act of maritime piracy, fired at one of the Iranian commercial ships in the waters of the Sea of Oman and disrupted its navigation system by landing a number of its marines on board the said ship, in a blatant attack on it. We warn that the armed forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran will soon respond to this criminal act of armed piracy by the US military, and will take appropriate countermeasures and escalate the situation. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 特朗普：今天，一艘名为 TOUSKA 的伊朗籍货船，长近 900 英尺，重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰，试图突破我们的海军封锁，但他们的下场并不好。美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号（USS SPRUANCE）导弹驱逐舰……” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部警告将对美国的违规行为作出回应：侵略者美国违反停火协议并实施海上盗版行为，在阿曼海海域向一艘伊朗商船开火，并通过派遣多名海军陆战队员登船干扰了其导航系统，这是对该船的公然袭击。我们警告，伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队很快将对美军这种武装盗版的犯罪行为作出回应，并将采取适当的反制措施，使局势升级。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: OSINTdefender Iran’s state-run Tasnim News Agency, which is affiliated with the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC), is claiming that Iranian forces attacked some American military ships with drones in response to today’s U.S. attack on the Iranian-flagged Touska in the Gulf of Oman. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045991951816671564/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 伊朗官方塔斯尼姆通讯社（Tasnim News Agency）隶属于伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC），声称伊朗军队用无人机袭击了一些美国军舰，以回应今天美国在阿曼湾对悬挂伊朗国旗的“Touska”号发动的袭击。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045991951816671564/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Bessent telling people to cut their withholding and calling it a “real wage increase” could seriously screw people. It’s not a raise, you’re just getting your own money earlier, and if you get it wrong you could end up owing at tax time. Bessent: I want to encourage everyone out there watching today to change their withholding ... you will get an automatic real wage increase on a weekly or a monthly basis. https://twitter.com/unusual_whales/status/2045986044550565996/video/1 - unusual_whales tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 贝森特（Bessent）告诉人们削减预扣税并称之为“实际工资增长”，这可能会严重坑害人们。这不是加薪，你只是提前拿到了自己的钱，如果算错了，你可能会在报税时欠税。贝森特：我想鼓励今天观看节目的每个人都去更改预扣税……你每周或每月都会自动获得实际工资增长。https://twitter.com/unusual_whales/status/2045986044550565996/video/1 - unusual_whales 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : Radio audio from today’s Iranian attack on the Indian-flagged crude oil tanker, M/T SANMAR HERALD, while the vessel was attempting to pass eastbound through the Strait of Hormuz, after reportedly been given permission by Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy (IRGC-N). The SANMAR HERALD has since withdrawn back to the Persian Gulf, with the IRGC-N once again announcing the total closure of the Hormuz Strait. Audio credit: @TankerTrackers tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @sentdefender ：来自今天伊朗袭击悬挂印度国旗的原油油轮“M/T SANMAR HERALD”号的无线电音频，当时该船在据称获得伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军（IRGC-N）许可后，正试图向东通过霍尔木兹海峡。SANMAR HERALD号此后已撤回波斯湾，IRGC-N再次宣布完全关闭霍尔木兹海峡。音频来源：@TankerTrackers 推文

text_zh: OSINTdefender 伊朗武装部队哈塔姆·安比亚（Khatam al-Anbiya）中央总部表示，他们将“很快回应并报复”今天美国在阿曼湾对一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的货船发动的袭击和扣押，称这是对停火协议的违反，是美国的“武装海盗行为”。推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 IRAN SAYS IT WILL RESPOND TO AMERICAS “ARMED MARITIME PIRACY” JUST IN 🔴 Islamic Regime Khatam al Anbiya Headquarters: We will soon respond to what we call America’s armed maritime piracy. 🔹 The United States violated the ceasefire and carried out an act of maritime aggression by firing on an Iranian commercial vessel in the Sea of Oman, disabling its navigation system, and deploying Marines onto the ship. 🔹 The Armed Forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran say they will respond and retaliate for this action by U.S. forces. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 突发 🔴 伊朗称将回应美国的“武装海上盗窃行为” 最新消息 🔴 伊斯兰政权哈塔姆·安比亚总部：我们将很快回应所谓的美国武装海上盗窃行为。 🔹 美国违反了停火协议，通过向阿曼海的一艘伊朗商船开火、瘫痪其导航系统并部署海军陆战队登船，实施了海上侵略行为。 🔹 伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队表示，他们将对美军的这一行动进行回应和报复。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Islamic Regime Khatam al Anbiya Headquarters: We will soon respond to what we call America’s armed maritime piracy. 🔹 The United States violated the ceasefire and carried out an act of maritime aggression by firing on an Iranian commercial vessel in the Sea of Oman, disabling its navigation system, and deploying Marines onto the ship. 🔹 The Armed Forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran say they will respond and retaliate for this action by U.S. forces. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 伊斯兰政权哈塔姆·安比亚总部：我们将很快回应所谓的美国武装海上盗窃行为。 🔹 美国违反了停火协议，通过向阿曼海的一艘伊朗商船开火、瘫痪其导航系统并部署海军陆战队登船，实施了海上侵略行为。 🔹 伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队表示，他们将对美军的这一行动进行回应和报复。推文

text: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli Forces Respond After Soldier Photographed Smashing Jesus Statue in Southern Lebanon Israeli Occupation Forces confirmed that the soldier seen in the photograph destroying a statue of Jesus Christ in southern Lebanon is an IOF soldier. The IOF called the conduct a "serious breach of expected military values," saying it is under investigation by the Northern Command and that disciplinary measures will follow. The military added it is working to have the statue restored. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列军队在士兵被拍到在黎巴嫩南部损毁耶稣雕像后做出回应 以色列占领军证实，照片中在黎巴嫩南部摧毁耶稣基督雕像的士兵是其军队士兵。以军称这种行为是“对预期军事价值观的严重违背”，并表示北方司令部正在进行调查，随后将采取纪律处分。军方补充说，他们正在努力修复该雕像。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 💥 🇺🇸 Iranian Armed Forces Central Headquarters (Khatam al-Anbiya): Iran Will Soon Respond to U.S. Armed Maritime Piracy TEHRAN – The spokesman for the Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters has confirmed that Iran's armed forces will soon retaliate for what he described as "an act of armed maritime piracy by the U.S. military in the Gulf of Oman ." IRGC Lt. Col. Ebrahim Zolfaghari , the spokesman, stated that the " aggressive United States " violated the ceasefire and committed maritime banditry by opening fire on one of Iran's commercial vessels in Omani waters, disabling its navigation system. He further alleged that U.S. forces boarded the ship after deploying armed personnel onto its deck. "We warn that the armed forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran will soon respond to and retaliate for this armed piracy by the U.S. Army." 🐻 The Epstinites are doing everything in their power to FAFO on Tuesday, when the ceasefire expires - and Iran is ready to accommodate them. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 💥 🇺🇸 伊朗武装部队中央总部（哈塔姆·安比亚）：伊朗将很快回应美国的武装海上盗窃行为 德黑兰——哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人证实，伊朗武装部队很快将对所谓的“美国军方在阿曼湾实施的武装海上盗窃行为”进行报复。发言人、伊斯兰革命卫队中校易卜拉欣·佐尔法加里（Ebrahim Zolfaghari）表示，“侵略性的美国”违反了停火协议，通过向伊朗的一艘商船开火并瘫痪其导航系统，犯下了海上强盗罪行。他进一步声称，美军在向甲板部署武装人员后登上了该船。“我们警告，伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队很快将对美国军队的这种武装盗窃行为做出回应和报复。” 🐻 爱泼斯坦分子（Epstinites）正竭尽全力在周二停火协议到期时作死（FAFO）——而伊朗已准备好满足他们。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗军事指挥部表示，将对美国今天早些时候炮击并扣押悬挂伊朗国旗的货船“Touska”号进行报复，称此次封锁行动是“美军的武装海盗行为”。 推文

text: Faytuks News BREAKING: Iran’s central military headquarters says that they will soon "retaliate" for the US attack on an Iranian-flagged tanker in the Gulf of Oman - IRIB https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2045983429221585298/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 快讯：伊朗中央军事总部表示，他们很快将对美国在阿曼湾袭击一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的油轮的行为进行“报复” - IRIB https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2045983429221585298/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender As the Defender Media Team and our communities on various social media sites continue to grow, we are happy to announce the launch of OSINTdefender on TikTok, featuring updates on conflicts, geopolitic situations and other newsworthy events around the world, now via TikTok! https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045982422026645898/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 随着 Defender 媒体团队和我们在各大社交媒体网站上的社区不断壮大，我们很高兴地宣布 OSINTdefender 在 TikTok 上线，我们将通过 TikTok 提供有关全球冲突、地缘政治局势和其他新闻事件的最新动态！ https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045982422026645898/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷CENTCOM reports the USS Spruance intercepted the M/V Touska, as it transited the northern Arabian Sea in a deliberate and proportional manner. After issuing multiple warnings over a six-hour period, U.S. forces reported the vessel failed to comply.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s Khatam al‑Anbiya Central Headquarters spokesman accused the United States of violating the ceasefire by firing at an Iranian commercial ship in the Gulf of Oman, disabling its navigation system and boarding it with gunmen. “We warn that Iran’s armed forces will soon respond and retaliate for this armed piracy,” the spokesman said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷中央司令部报告称，斯普鲁恩斯号驱逐舰（USS Spruance）在阿拉伯海北部航行时，以审慎且适度的方式拦截了 M/V Touska 号货船。在六小时内发出多次警告后，美军报告称该船未予理会……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚（Khatam al-Anbiya）中央总部发言人指责美国在阿曼湾向一艘伊朗商船开火，破坏其导航系统并派遣武装人员登船，违反了停火协议。“我们警告，伊朗武装部队很快将对这种武装海盗行为作出回应并进行报复，”发言人说。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 Heavy aerial activity has been reported over southern Syria close to the Israeli border. Reports state that said aerial activity is accompanied by aerial refueling tankers. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 据报道，叙利亚南部靠近以色列边境的地区出现了频繁的空中活动。报告称，上述空中活动伴有空中加油机。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iran, Pakistan Foreign Ministers Discuss Ceasefire in Phone Call Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi and Pakistani Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Mohammad Ishaq Dar spoke by phone Sunday, discussing regional developments and ceasefire-related issues. Dar outlined Pakistan's efforts to end the war and restore regional peace, reaffirming Islamabad's readiness to continue consultations. Araghchi thanked Pakistan for its mediation efforts, while stressing Iran's responsible approach to diplomatic engagement. He pointed to what he described as repeated US bad faith — including US military strikes on Iran during active negotiations in May and March 2025 — as well as recent ceasefire violations, threats against Iranian ports, coastlines and vessels, threatening rhetoric, unreasonable demands, and persistent contradictions as clear evidence that Washington is not serious about diplomacy. Araghchi stated that Iran will use all available means to protect its national interests and security. Both ministers agreed to continue consultations toward their shared goal of preserving regional peace and stability. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗、巴基斯坦外交部长通话讨论停火事宜。伊朗外交部长赛义德·阿巴斯·阿拉格希与巴基斯坦副总理兼外交部长穆罕默德·伊沙克·达尔周日通电话，讨论了地区局势和与停火相关的问题。达尔概述了巴基斯坦为结束战争和恢复地区和平所做的努力，并重申伊斯兰堡愿意继续进行磋商。阿拉格希感谢巴基斯坦的调解努力，同时强调了伊朗在外交接触中负责任的态度。他指出，美国多次表现出不诚实——包括2025年5月和3月在积极谈判期间对伊朗进行的军事打击——以及最近违反停火协议、威胁伊朗港口、海岸线和船只、威胁性言论、无理要求和持续的矛盾，这些都是华盛顿在外交上不严肃的明确证据。阿拉格希表示，伊朗将利用一切可用手段保护其国家利益和安全。两位部长同意继续就维护地区和平与稳定的共同目标进行磋商。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Disclose.tv NEW - CENTCOM releases footage of the U.S. forces intercepting M/V Touska and says that "since the blockade’s commencement, U.S. forces have directed 25 commercial vessels to turn around or return to an Iranian port." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045976380379222379/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 美国中央司令部发布了美军拦截“Touska”号货轮的视频，并称“自封锁开始以来，美军已引导25艘商船掉头或返回伊朗港口。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045976380379222379/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender The Israel Defense Force has confirmed the authenticity of a photo showing an Israeli Soldier smashing a statue of Jesus Christ in Southern Lebanon, adding that “appropriate measures will be taken against those involved” under the IDF Northern Command. Photo currently circulating on social media which appears to show a soldier with the Israel Defense Force striking and destroying a statue of Jesus Christ on the cross using a sledgehammer during recent operations in the Christian town of Debel in Southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045951769692213729/photo/1 - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 以色列国防军已证实一张照片的真实性，照片显示一名以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部砸毁了一尊耶稣基督雕像，并补充说，根据以色列国防军北方司令部的规定，“将对相关人员采取适当措施”。目前在社交媒体上流传的照片显示，在最近黎巴嫩南部基督教城镇德贝尔（Debel）的行动中，一名以色列国防军士兵使用大锤击打并摧毁了一尊十字架上的耶稣基督雕像。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045951769692213729/photo/1 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: Open Source Intel 2 U.S. officials and 2 Mexican officials were killed in a car crash in the northern Mexican state of Chihuahua while supporting local efforts to combat cartel operations, the U.S. embassy and state authorities said. BREAKING 🔴 Embassy: 2 U.S. officials killed in a car crash in Mexico while assisting anti cartel operations - Reuters - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国大使馆和州政府表示，2名美国官员和2名墨西哥官员在墨西哥北部奇瓦瓦州的一场车祸中丧生，当时他们正在支持当地打击贩毒集团的行动。突发 🔴 大使馆：2名美国官员在墨西哥协助打击贩毒集团行动时死于车祸 - 路透社 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: WarMonitor Zelensky says Ukraine has signed 10-year defense deals with Saudi Arabia, the UAE, and Qatar, with interest from 11 countries, as part of a broader push to expand drone production, including new manufacturing and joint tech development across Europe and the Middle East. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045974468284055845/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 泽连斯基表示，乌克兰已与沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋和卡塔尔签署了为期10年的防务协议，并有11个国家表示有兴趣，这是扩大无人机生产更广泛推动的一部分，包括在欧洲和中东进行新的制造和联合技术开发。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045974468284055845/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Footage of the destroyer USS Spruance firing its main gun at the Iranian-flagged cargo vessel Touska as it attempted to run the US blockade today. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045974375074083220/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 驱逐舰“斯普鲁恩斯”号（USS Spruance）向试图突破美国封锁的伊朗籍货轮“Touska”号发射主炮的视频。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045974375074083220/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 BREAKING | According Iranian press tv, During a phone conversation with his Pakistani counterpart, Iran FM Abbas Araghchi 👉 Recalled America's repeated breaches of faith over the past year. 👉 Cited US military aggression against Iran during negotiations in June and March 2025. 👉 Noted recent US violations of the ceasefire, threats to Iranian ports/coasts/vessels, threatening rhetoric, unreasonable demands, and contradictions. 👉 Stated these are clear signs of US ill intentions and lack of seriousness in diplomacy. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 突发 | 据伊朗新闻电视台报道，在与巴基斯坦外长通话时，伊朗外长阿巴斯·阿拉格希 👉 回顾了美国过去一年多次违背承诺的行为。 👉 提到了美国在2025年6月和3月谈判期间对伊朗的军事侵略。 👉 指出了美国近期违反停火协议、威胁伊朗港口/海岸/船只、威胁性言论、无理要求和矛盾行为。 👉 表示这些是美国恶意和在外交上缺乏诚意的明确迹象。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF: A preliminary review of a photo showing a soldier damaging a Christian symbol confirms it was taken in southern Lebanon. The IDF says the conduct is taken seriously and does not reflect the standards expected of its troops. The Northern Command is investigating, and the case is being handled through the chain of command. Action will follow based on the findings. The military is also working with the local community to restore the statue. The IDF states its mission in southern Lebanon is to dismantle Hezbollah infrastructure and that it does not target civilian or religious sites. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军：对一张显示士兵损坏基督教符号的照片进行的初步审查证实，该照片是在黎巴嫩南部拍摄的。以色列国防军表示，这种行为被严肃对待，并不反映对其部队所期望的标准。北方司令部正在进行调查，案件正通过指挥链处理。将根据调查结果采取行动。军方也正在与当地社区合作修复雕像。以色列国防军声明其在黎巴嫩南部的任务是拆除真主党基础设施，并不针对平民或宗教场所。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Central Command: Guided-missile destroyer USS Spruance (DDG 111) intercepted M/V Touska as it transited the north Arabian Sea at 17 knots enroute to Bandar Abbas, Iran. American forces issued multiple warnings and informed the Iranian-flagged vessel it was in violation of the U.S. blockade. After Touska’s crew failed to comply with repeated warnings over a six-hour period, Spruance directed the vessel to evacuate its engine room. Spruance disabled Touska’s propulsion by firing several rounds from the destroyer’s 5-inch MK 45 Gun into Touska’s engine room. U.S. Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit later boarded the non-compliant vessel, which remains in U.S. custody. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部：导弹驱逐舰“斯普鲁恩斯”号（DDG 111）在“Touska”号货轮以17节航速驶往伊朗阿巴斯港途中，在北阿拉伯海对其进行了拦截。美军发出了多次警告，并告知这艘伊朗籍船只违反了美国的封锁。在“Touska”号船员在六小时内未遵守多次警告后，“斯普鲁恩斯”号指示该船撤离机舱。“斯普鲁恩斯”号通过从驱逐舰的5英寸MK 45舰炮发射多发炮弹击中“Touska”号机舱，使其失去了动力。来自第31海军陆战队远征部队的美国海军陆战队员随后登上了这艘不合规的船只，该船目前仍在美国的控制之下。推文

text: Open Source Intel MUST WATCH 🔴 CENTCOM: On April 19, U.S. forces in the Arabian Sea enforced the blockade by intercepting the Iranian flagged M V Touska heading to Bandar Abbas at 17 knots. USS Spruance (DDG-111) issued repeated warnings over 6 hours. After non compliance, the crew was ordered to clear the engine room, which was then disabled by 5 inch MK 45 fire. Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit boarded the vessel. It is now in U.S. custody. CENTCOM says the action was deliberate and proportional. 25 vessels have been turned back since the blockade began. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 必看 🔴 中央司令部：4月19日，阿拉伯海的美军通过拦截以17节航速驶往阿巴斯港的伊朗籍“Touska”号货轮执行了封锁。“斯普鲁恩斯”号（DDG-111）在6小时内发出了多次警告。在不合规后，船员被命令清理机舱，随后机舱被5英寸MK 45炮火摧毁。来自第31海军陆战队远征部队的海军陆战队员登上了该船。目前该船处于美国控制之下。中央司令部称此行动是蓄意且适度的。自封锁开始以来，已有25艘船只被遣返。推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) has released video of the interdiction of the motor vessel Touska in the Northern Arabian Sea by the U.S. Navy Arleigh Burke-class guided missile destroyer USS Spruance (DDG-111). The video contains audio of the USS Spruance giving warnings to the Touska to vacate the engine room before firing the Mark 45 5" deck gun 3 times at the vessel. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）发布了美国海军阿利·伯克级导弹驱逐舰“斯普鲁恩斯”号（DDG-111）在北阿拉伯海拦截“Touska”号货轮的视频。视频中包含“斯普鲁恩斯”号在向该船发射3发5英寸MK 45舰炮炮弹前，警告“Touska”号撤离机舱的音频。推文
